summary: All Section A init checks, baseline build to Phase 2 (one feature recorded), Section F sponsored_poc -> production upgrade, and Section G post-flight checks passed. PR #17 U-E (poc_mode lookup), U-F (sentinel respect), U-H (helper scripts copied) and PR #18 framework-self guard + fake-remote tolerance all confirmed working. No regressions, no new bugs, no still-open prior-sweep bugs (U-I) observed in this config.
